prompt: Build the Persian word “امید” in the cracked 3D style from the first image and place it over a solid background in the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate the Persian word “امید” in a 3D block-letter style. This style should incorporate the distinct cracked texture, bold red color, and cross-hatching shading as observed on the text in image 1. Position the rendered word centrally on a solid, flat background that precisely matches the light pink color from image 2.
objects: Bold red color on the word
